expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the case focus is explicitly named and mapped to concrete defects: "Cross-section interaction audit catches template × pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states" and then "Template × Pause Mode" (BCIN-7730) plus "Prompt editor open" issues (BCIN-7708, BCIN-7709).

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly frame the work as Phase 5a and reference Phase 5a rubric requirements (including the required "## Cross-Section Interaction Audit" section and Phase 5a acceptance/return rule): result.md header "Phase 5a — Cross-Section Interaction Audit" and "Primary phase under test: phase5a".
